case_title: JANET KIM VS. HERTZ CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT HERTZ CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-30-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-28-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUL-15-2004

DECLARATION OF BRIAN A. RIPLEY RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIM, JANET
BEFORE HEARING, PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-08-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-30-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-25-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF JANET KIM'S ATTY'S (BRIAN A. RIPLEY) MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANT MOTION TO WITHDRAW PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL (BRIAN A. RIPLEY). NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. HON. PAUL H. ALVARADO. REPORTER: ROBERT BALIAN, CSR #5220

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-13-2004 CONTINUED TO NOV-24-2004 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO WITHDRAW AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE THEREON. OCT-13-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER GRANTING ATTORNEY'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR RIPLEY, BRIAN ARTHUR AS ATTORNEY FOR KIM, JANET

MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-09-2005 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST JANET KIM FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-09-2005, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-24-2005. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: NOREEN IKEUYE # 3538 (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-09-2005 CONTINUED TO APR-13-2005 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). FEB-09-2005 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-13-2005 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST JANET KIM, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-13-2005, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-28-2005. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: JANET POND. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-13-2005 CONTINUED TO JUN-15-2005 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
